scripts.build: prisma generate && node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const url = (process.env.DATABASE_URL || '').trim(); if (/^postgres(?:ql)?:///i.test(url)) { console.log('Applying Prisma schema to Postgres database...'); execSync('prisma db push --accept-data-loss', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('Skipping Prisma db push because DATABASE_URL is not a Postgres connection string.'); }" && next build
